Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all cases

Name: Number of times SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurs in the entire event log
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' activities

Name: Percentage of process variants that include SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision being directly preceded by SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences that are followed by SW-EIC Accept
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences that are followed by SW-EIC Reject
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences that are followed by SW-EIC Major Revision
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences that are followed by SW-EIC Minor Revision
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-EIC Minor Revision'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision appearing after SW-Reviewer Agreed in the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Percentage of cases where SW-Reviewer Agreed is followed by SW-Awaiting EIC Decision without intermediate reviewer-related activities
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Ratio of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences to SW-Awaiting AE Assignment occurrences
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision that occur in variants with more than three revision cycles
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in cases that ultimately result in acceptance (e.g., followed by RW-EIC Accept or SW-EIC Accept)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences that are not followed by any EIC decision within 30 days
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all cases

Name: Number of distinct cases containing SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' activities

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences that follow at least one instance of SW-Reviewer Agreed in the same trace
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision appearing in variants that include Immediate Reject Decision from the Checklist
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'Immediate Reject Decision from the Checklist'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences that are part of a re-submission cycle (i.e., preceded by Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Ratio of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision to total EIC-related waiting states (including RW-Awaiting EIC Decision and RSW-Awaiting EIC Decision)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'RW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision that occur after three or more reviewer assignment attempts (e.g., multiple SW-AE Assign Reviewers or SW-Reviewer Declined)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'
